name: Aurora Curley
description: A striking young woman with voluminous medium-brown curls framing her face, captivating green eyes that draw immediate attention. Her natural look includes subtle freckles across cheeks and nose, enhancing authenticity while maintaining elegance. Styled in minimalist white tank top against neutral backdrop, she exudes effortless confidence perfect for modern editorial campaigns.

profile.hair: Medium brown curly texture with soft volume around face
profile.eyes: Bright green irises with defined lashes and minimal makeup accentuating clarity
profile.overall_look: Elegant contemporary aesthetic blending natural charm with refined studio lighting
